ORDERS.CREATE_MANUAL_ORDER_DESC: Create a new order for your customer directly from here.
ORDERS.REVIEW_BEFORE_SUBMIT: Please review order details before confirming
ORDERS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by order ID or customer name...

FILTERS.TITLE: Order Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Narrow down orders by status, payment, and timing

TABLE.TITLE: Orders List
TABLE.SUBTITLE: Review incoming orders and their status in one table.

ORDERS.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load orders. Check your connection and try again.

NEW.TITLE: New order
NEW.DESCRIPTION: The order was received from the customer and is waiting for your review.

CONFIRMED.TITLE: Confirmed
CONFIRMED.DESCRIPTION: The order was accepted and moved into preparation.

IN_PROGRESS.TITLE: Preparing
IN_PROGRESS.DESCRIPTION: Items are being prepared and packed in the store.

READY_FOR_PICKUP.TITLE: Ready for pickup
READY_FOR_PICKUP.DESCRIPTION: The order is ready and waiting for the courier to arrive.

DRIVER_ASSIGNMENT_IN_PROGRESS.TITLE: Finding a driver
DRIVER_ASSIGNMENT_IN_PROGRESS.DESCRIPTION: The system is searching for the nearest available courier.

DRIVER_ASSIGNED.TITLE: Driver assigned
DRIVER_ASSIGNED.DESCRIPTION: A courier was assigned and will head to the store for pickup.

PICKED_UP.TITLE: Picked up from store
PICKED_UP.DESCRIPTION: The courier picked up the order from the store.

OUT_FOR_DELIVERY.TITLE: On the way
OUT_FOR_DELIVERY.DESCRIPTION: The courier is on the way to the customer address.

DELIVERED.TITLE: Delivered
DELIVERED.DESCRIPTION: The order was delivered to the customer successfully.

CANCELLED.TITLE: Cancelled
CANCELLED.DESCRIPTION: The order was cancelled and delivery was stopped.

DELIVERY_FAILED.TITLE: Delivery failed
DELIVERY_FAILED.DESCRIPTION: Delivery could not be completed and needs follow-up.

REFUNDED.TITLE: Refunded
REFUNDED.DESCRIPTION: The order amount was refunded to the customer.

NOTES.VENDOR_CONFIRMED_PICKUP: Vendor confirmed pickup handoff via OTP

ORDERS.EMPTY_DESC: New orders will appear here as soon as they are placed
ORDERS.SYNCHRONIZE_HANDOFF: Synchronize the physical handoff by entering the 4-digit cryptographic security code provided to the carrier.
ORDERS.LOGISTICS_ORCHESTRATION: Orchestrating logistics network to secure the optimal delivery carrier.

SUPPORT_CENTER.TITLE: Support & Reference Center
SUPPORT_CENTER.SUBTITLE: Track active support tickets and browse operational guides from one page with the same clear super admin-inspired structure.

SUMMARY.OPEN_TICKETS_HINT: Cases that still require follow-up or final closure from support.
SUMMARY.PENDING_FOLLOWUPS_HINT: Tickets that still need a document or clarification from your team.
SUMMARY.AVG_RESPONSE_HINT: Approximate average time for the first response from support.
SUMMARY.REFERENCE_COUNT_HINT: Quick guides and policies you can review before opening a new case.

FILTERS.TITLE: Filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Refine the current view by status, category, priority, or article type.

SEARCH.TICKETS: Search by ticket reference, subject, or summary

SECTIONS.SUPPORT_SUBTITLE: Review current tickets and continue the conversation from the same screen.
SECTIONS.REFERENCE_SUBTITLE: Short guides and policies to check before opening a new ticket.

DETAIL.THREAD_SUBTITLE: Every reply between your team and support appears here in time order.
DETAIL.RELATED_REFERENCE_SUBTITLE: Guides and policies from the same category that can help close the case faster.
DETAIL.COMPOSER_SUBTITLE: Send the update or clarification needed to move the case forward.
DETAIL.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Write your reply or the clarification you want to add to this ticket
DETAIL.CLOSED_BANNER: This ticket has been closed. If you are still facing the issue, please open a new support ticket.

REFERENCE.RELATED_TICKETS_SUBTITLE: Recent tickets from the same category so the reference stays connected to similar cases.

CREATE.TITLE: Open a Support Case
CREATE.SUBTITLE: Provide a clear summary so the request reaches the right team quickly.
CREATE.ORDER_PLACEHOLDER: Select a related order if needed
CREATE.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Explain the issue, request, and the steps already taken before contacting support

EMPTY.TICKETS_TITLE: No tickets match the current view
EMPTY.TICKETS_SUBTITLE: Try lighter filters or create a new ticket from the top action.
EMPTY.SELECT_TICKET_TITLE: Select a case to view its details
EMPTY.SELECT_TICKET_SUBTITLE: Choose a ticket from the table to load its summary and conversation.
EMPTY.ARTICLES_TITLE: No articles match the current filters
EMPTY.ARTICLES_SUBTITLE: Adjust the search or filters to surface the right guides.
EMPTY.SELECT_ARTICLE_SUBTITLE: Pick any article from the list to load its operational details.
EMPTY.RELATED_REFERENCE: There are no related references for this category right now.
EMPTY.RELATED_TICKETS: There are no related tickets for this category right now.

FEEDBACK.TICKET_CREATED: The support ticket was created successfully.
FEEDBACK.TICKET_CREATE_FAILED: The support ticket could not be created. Check the order ID and try again.
FEEDBACK.MESSAGE_SENT: Your reply was sent to the ticket.
FEEDBACK.MESSAGE_SEND_FAILED: Your reply could not be sent. Please try again.
FEEDBACK.SEED_RESET: The demo support workspace was reset.

VENDOR_DISPUTES.TITLE: Disputes
VENDOR_DISPUTES.SUBTITLE: Track support cases linked to your orders and respond to the review team.

FILTERS.TITLE: Case filters
FILTERS.SUBTITLE: Narrow the disputes list by status or case type.
FILTERS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by case ID, order #, reason, or message

TABLE.TITLE: Disputes queue
TABLE.SUBTITLE: Open a case to review updates, attachments, and respond.

SUBMITTED.TITLE: Case opened
SUBMITTED.NOTE: We received the support case for order #{{orderNumber}} and it is now under review.

REQUEST_EVIDENCE.TITLE: More evidence requested
REQUEST_EVIDENCE.NOTE: We need additional information or evidence to continue reviewing the case for order #{{orderNumber}}.

APPROVED.TITLE: Case approved
APPROVED.NOTE: Your return request has been approved. You will be notified when the financial processing begins.

REJECTED.TITLE: Case rejected
REJECTED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} has been rejected.

RESOLVED.TITLE: Case resolved
RESOLVED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} has been resolved and closed.

ESCALATED.TITLE: Case escalated
ESCALATED.NOTE: The support case linked to order #{{orderNumber}} was escalated to a specialized team.

ADMIN_MESSAGE.TITLE: Admin update
ADMIN_MESSAGE.NOTE: Support shared an update on this case.

DECISION.NOTE: A final decision was recorded for this case.

PUBLIC_NOTE.NOTE: A public note was added to this case.

EMPTY.TITLE: No disputes found
EMPTY.SUBTITLE: There are no cases matching the current filters.

DETAIL.TITLE: Dispute case
DETAIL.SUMMARY_SUBTITLE: Core dispute information and refund context.
DETAIL.NOTES_SUBTITLE: Review the original case message and any visible notes.
DETAIL.ATTACHMENTS_SUBTITLE: Files shared with this dispute case.
DETAIL.NO_ATTACHMENTS: No attachments were shared for this case.
DETAIL.ACTIVITY_SUBTITLE: Visible case events and reviewer updates.
DETAIL.CONVERSATION_SUBTITLE: Messages visible to your team inside this case.
DETAIL.REPLY_SUBTITLE: Reply to the case reviewer with additional context.
DETAIL.REPLY_PLACEHOLDER: Write your response, explanation, or evidence summary here...
DETAIL.RESPONSE_FAILED: Unable to send your response right now.
DETAIL.CLOSED_BANNER: This dispute is currently closed. Additional messages or attachments cannot be sent.
DETAIL.UPLOAD_FAILED: Could not upload the file. Please try again.
